title: Vietnamese-Style Pork Meatballs with Rice Bun
description: A fusion recipe of Vietnamese and smoky flavors featuring pork meatballs served on a crunchy rice bun. Pair with your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: Mix pork, egg, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Add smoky fish sauce and Vietnamese chili sauce to the bowl and mix well.
Heat a pan with some oil over medium heat.
Add the meatballs to the pan and cook until browned on all sides.
Transfer the meatballs to a baking tray and bake at 180°C for 12 minutes.
Split the rice bun in half lengthwise.
Place a few meatballs on each bun half.
Sprinkle chopped Vietnamese coriander on top of the meatballs.
